name: Phase 1: Validate deepracer_tools.py on save
description: When deepracer_tools.py is saved, check that all @tool decorators are present, stop_car() is in a finally block, and no tool raises exceptions to callers.

action.message:
The file phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/deepracer_tools.py was just saved. Please review it and verify:
1. All 6 public functions (deepracer_connect, deepracer_move_forward, deepracer_move_backward, deepracer_turn_left, deepracer_turn_right, deepracer_stop) have the @tool decorator.
2. _move_for_duration() calls client.stop_car() inside a finally block.
3. No tool function raises an exception — all errors are returned as strings prefixed with 'Error '.
4. _get_client() raises RuntimeError if DEEPRACER_PASSWORD is not set.
5. Throttle signs follow the convention: forward=-FWD_THROTTLE, backward=+FWD_THROTTLE, turns use -TURN_THROTTLE.
Report any violations found.
